other_observers: Larry Modesitt, Mark Peterson, Bob Brown, Andrew Spencer, m. ob.;
description: A dark looking jaeger, juvenile plummage from the lack of tail extensions, grayish-brown mottled color overall, with no clear cap. Whitish fringes to the mantle feathers, 2 visible white primary shafts seen in the opened upper-wing, dar and white checkered tail coverts and underwing coverts, short bill with half black tip and nail, and gonydeal angle at mid-point point of the lower mandible.Behaviors: floating in a lake, riding high in the water, occasionally flying short distancesCall: none detectedPlumage: intermediate juvenile
photographer: Photographer: Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek
